summary: Tested Plan Library actuarial certification features. All backend tests (8/8) and frontend tests passed. Compliance popup correctly shows MV method as 'HHS Calculator' or 'Estimated' for non-actuary-certified plans, and does NOT show 'Actuarial Certification' row. Bronze HDHP (MV 58%) correctly shows 'Get Actuarial Quote' button. Plans with MV >= 60% (Silver PPO, Gold HMO) correctly do NOT show the quote button. Affordability section shows 'Full-Time / FTE Employees' count.
passed_tests: Backend: compliance-check returns certified_by_actuary: null for plans without real actuary certification
Backend: compliance-check returns has_active_quote field (false for most plans, true for Bronze HDHP with active quote)
Backend: MV method shows 'Estimated' or 'HHS Calculator' for non-actuary-certified plans
Backend: Bronze HDHP has MV=58% and should show 'Get Actuarial Quote' button
Backend: Silver PPO has MV=62% and should NOT show 'Get Actuarial Quote' button
Backend: Affordability shows total_ft_employees count (47 employees)
Backend: Login works for employer fajju2001@gmail.com / test123
Frontend: Plan Library page loads with 8 plan cards
Frontend: Bronze HDHP shows 'Get Actuarial Quote' button
Frontend: Silver PPO does NOT show 'Get Actuarial Quote' button
Frontend: Gold HMO does NOT show 'Get Actuarial Quote' button
Frontend: Compliance dialog for Bronze HDHP shows MV method as 'HHS Calculator'
Frontend: Compliance dialog does NOT show 'Actuarial Certification' row for uncertified plans
Frontend: Compliance dialog shows 'Certification Request: Paid' for Bronze HDHP (active quote)
Frontend: Affordability section shows 'Full-Time / FTE Employees: 47'
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing plans used: Bronze HDHP (MV 58%), Silver PPO (MV 62%), Gold HMO (MV 78%)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Actuarial certification features tested. Key findings: 1) compliance-check endpoint correctly returns certified_by_actuary: null for plans without real actuary certification (via quote_requests collection). 2) MV method shows 'Estimated' or 'HHS Calculator' based on mv_certified flag, NOT 'Actuarial Certification' unless certification_source='actuary'. 3) Bronze HDHP has an active quote (status: paid) but no completed certification yet. 4) 'Get Actuarial Quote' button only shows for plans with MV < 60% AND no actuary certification. 5) Affordability section shows Full-Time / FTE Employees count (47 employees).
